state.last_generated_code:
use_bpm 100
use_random_seed 1234
set_volume! 0.9

with_fx :reverb, mix: 0.2, room: 0.7 do
live_loop :kick do
  vals = (ring 1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0)
  hit = vals.tick
  if hit == 1 && rand <= 1.0
    sample :bd_haus, amp: (0.9 + rrand(-0.03, 0.03)).clamp(0, 1)
  end
  sleep (0.5 + rrand(-0.0, 0.0)).clamp(0.01, 4)
end

live_loop :hat do
  vals = (ring 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0)
  hit = vals.tick
  if hit == 1 && rand <= 0.9
    sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: (0.35 + rrand(-0.06, 0.06)).clamp(0, 1)
  end
  sleep (0.25 + rrand(-0.01, 0.01)).clamp(0.01, 4)
end

live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :tb303
  ns = (ring :e1, :e1, :g1, :a1)
  ds = (ring 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5)
  n = ns.tick(:n)
  d = ds.tick(:d)
  if rand <= 0.95
    play note(n) + 0, release: 0.2, cutoff: 80, res: 0.8, amp: 0.45
  end
  sleep d
end

live_loop :pad do
  use_synth :prophet
  degs = (ring 1, 4, 6, 5)
  d = degs.tick
  ch = chord_degree(d, :e2, :minor_pentatonic, :minor7, 4)
  play ch, release: 3.2, cutoff: 92, amp: 0.22
  sleep 4.0
end

end

live_loop :bass do

live_loop :pad do
  use_synth :prophet

live_loop :ai_loop do
  tempo 84
  beat 32
  pattern [
    [drum "hihat-on"] * 6,
    [drum "snare-on"] * 12,
    [drum "tom-top-on"] * 8,
    [drum "cowbell-on"] * 4,
    [note "A5"] * 8
  ]
end

live_loop :ai_loop do
  # Lo-fi Rhythm with Minimal Synthesis
  sample :loop3, gain: -6
  sleep 1
end
```

This creates a simple loop with minimal synthesis, mimicking the sound of a lo-fi rhythm.

live_loop :ai_loop do
  play_synth :piano, gain: 0.5, amp: 1.0
  sleep(rand(0.5..2))
  play_sample "lofi_hip_hop", pitch: rand(-3..3), volume: 0.7
end
